name: Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of packaging equipment for liquid products in China and internationally. Its products include filling sealing equipment comprising pouch filling equipment, such as aseptic soft-packaging forming filling sealing equipment; cup filling equipment, which include plastic cup forming, linear preformed cup, and rotary preformed cup filling sealing equipment, as well as PET cup forming filling sealing machines; and bottle filling equipment consisting of linear clean type and ultra clean type plastic bottle filling capping, linear aseptic plastic bottle filling capping, rotary plastic bottle weighing filling capping, and rotary plastic bottle filling sealing equipment, as well as blowing filling capping integrated machines. The company also provides bottle blow equipment, including full automatic and electric extrusion blow molding machines, full automatic injection blow and stretch blow molding machines, full electric injection stretch blow molding machines, and full automatic high speed rotary stretch blow molding machines. In addition, it offers downstream packaging equipment, such as sleeve wrapping, case packing and box packing, and stick product case packing equipment, as well as case packing machines; and integrated lines solutions comprising aseptic soft pouch product packaging, multi-pack product packaging, preformed cup product packaging, liquid ultra clean bottle beverage product, high volume bottle product packaging, pouch product downstream case packing, daily chemicals bottle product packaging, bottle carbonated beverage ultra clean, and preformed can product ultra clean production lines. The company's products are used in dairy, beverage, edible oil and grease, seasoning, household, and other industries. Hangzhou Zhongya Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
